layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Control Room Grid & Tetris Grid)

surfaces.cards: Retro-Futurism / Dark Grid (flat surface #0A0A0C, 1px border-white/5, hover:border-[#00FF94]/30, subtle drop-shadow on hover)
surfaces.terminal: Deep black #000000 with border-[#00FF94]/30 and subtle scanline background

motion.accents: React Fast Marquee for kinetic typography strips

components.buttons: Shadcn based but stripped of vercel look. Neon accents, sharp edges or subtle 4px radius. High contrast text.
components.icons: lucide-react for UI, react-icons for brand logos (Telegram, Stripe).

hero_background.description: Abstract futuristic 3D geometry, use with opacity 15% and mix-blend-screen as hero background overlay.

features_background.description: Neon tunnel, use for How It Works / Features bento grid background.

telegram_visual.description: Blurred telegram logo with blue lights, use for the bot status section.

landing.hero: Massive typography (text-5xl to text-6xl+). 'One Command. Instant Checkout.' Terminal UI mockup demonstrating the '/gen_checkout' command yielding a Rosebud AI Stripe link.
landing.how_it_works: Bento grid (Tetris Mode). Steps: 1. Auto Temp Mail Binding. 2. Bot trigger (/gen_checkout). 3. Stripe Lowest Plan Link Generation.
landing.status_indicator: Live server status card. 'Bot Status: Online'. Glowing green dot. Recent generated checkouts scrolling.
landing.history: Control room style table showing mocked recent generated checkout sessions.

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply data-testid to all interactive elements and buttons (e.g., data-testid='start-bot-btn').
Build a custom 'Terminal Window' component for the Hero section using JetBrains Mono font to simulate the Telegram bot conversation.
Do NOT use pure white #FFF for backgrounds. The entire site is strictly Dark Mode (background #050505).
Use framer-motion for smooth entrance animations. Ensure direct children of grid are motion.div if animated.
Use react-fast-marquee for a kinetic typography ribbon separating sections ('FAST SIGNUPS • NO HASSLE').
Install and use lucide-react and react-icons for all iconography. Avoid missing logo placeholders.
Apply generously spaced sections (py-24 or py-32) and bento grids for the 'How it works' and 'History' segments.
